news.t: Bonds Are Looking Up. These ETFs Make It Easier.

overview.description: The iShares iBonds 2026 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield and BBB-rated corporate bonds maturing in 2026. The fund will terminate in December 2026. IBHF was launched on Nov 10, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg 2026 Term High Yield and Income Index

data.title: Bonds Are Looking Up. These ETFs Make It Easier.
data.text: To get the most from your bond investments, consider funds that let you lock in an interest rate and maturity date to match your specific goals.
